texto: The majority of people I've come across in life have treated me unfairly. I'd be a liar if I said it didn't hurt; I have this deep wound in my soul I feel all the time, but I still choose to love despite my moments of anger and selfishness. Love is the only true, everlasting thing we all live for and who am I to rob someone of experiencing that?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Evan Stark que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “The majority of people I've come across in life have treated me unfairly. I'd be a liar if I said…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, humble, hurt, com foco em hurt e love.
